svg.title: Physical landscape of a function call
svg.desc: A landscape illustration: fuel burns at a power plant on the left, electricity travels through transmission towers to a small house where a computer sits on a desk, and a cable runs into a magnified view of the chip on the right. Inside the chip, electrons stream across silicon toward a single glowing transistor gate. Heat rises from the chip into the air above, mirroring the smoke rising from the plant. Tiny fractures are visible in the silicon.
